name: Willis Knighton
description_short: Willis Knighton Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Shreveport and Bossier City, Louisiana with savings, checking, loans, mortgages, and VISA credit cards.
description_long:
Willis Knighton Federal Credit Union (WKFCU) operates as a federally-chartered credit union serving the Shreveport and Bossier City area in Louisiana. Like all credit unions, it is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration), distinguishing it from traditional for-profit banks. The organization has been serving its community with competitive rates and member-focused services.

WKFCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including share savings accounts, checking accounts, share certificates (CDs), and various loan products. Their lending menu encompasses auto loans (new and used vehicles at 4.99% APR as low as), boat/motorcycle/ATV/RV financing, personal loans, overdraft lines of credit, and mortgage services including first mortgages and land loans. They also issue VISA credit cards and provide investment services. Members can access accounts through Internet Teller online banking and benefit from multiple branch and ATM locations across their service area.

As a credit union, WKFCU distinguishes itself through member ownership and the ability to offer competitive rates. Their current rate structure shows auto/boat/motorcycle loans at 4.99% APR, personal loans from 9.00% APR, and share certificates ranging from 3.44% to 3.75% APY depending on term length. They offer AutoLink vehicle search tools, refinancing promotions, and specialized products like share-secured loans at 4.00% APR. The organization emphasizes member education with resources comparing banks versus credit unions and promoting family savings benefits.

WKFCU is best suited for Louisiana residents in their service area who value credit union membership benefits and competitive rates. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements apply—not all consumers can join a credit union. Additionally, while the website displays current rates, it does not provide detailed information about membership criteria, fee structures, or specific terms and conditions for various products.
services: Share savings accounts and checking accounts
Share certificates (CDs) with terms from 6 months to 60 months
Auto loans for new and used vehicles
Boat, motorcycle, ATV, and RV financing
VISA credit cards and debit cards
First mortgage and land mortgage loans
Internet Teller online banking and account management
AutoLink vehicle search and financing tool
pros: Auto, boat, and motorcycle loan rates as low as 4.99% APR, competitive for credit union lending
Share certificates offering up to 3.75% APY for 6-month terms, above-market rates for savers
Share-secured loans available at 4.00% APR for members with limited credit
Online Internet Teller banking platform with account management and sign-up capabilities
Comprehensive loan portfolio including mortgages, personal loans, and specialty vehicle financing
Multiple branch and ATM locations in Shreveport and Bossier City service area
VISA credit card and debit card options with tap-to-pay contactless payment technology
cons: Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility requirements or field of membership restrictions
Limited information about fees, minimum deposits, or account maintenance requirements
No transparency on approval criteria, credit score requirements, or debt-to-income thresholds
Rates described as 'subject to change without notice' with no rate lock guarantees stated
Geographic limitation to Shreveport and Bossier City area reduces accessibility for out-of-region members
best_for: Louisiana residents in Shreveport and Bossier City seeking competitive auto and boat financing
Credit union members looking for above-market CD rates and savings products
Borrowers with established credit seeking mortgages or first-time home buyer programs
Vehicle shoppers using the AutoLink tool to research and finance new and used cars
diagnosis: Willis Knighton Federal Credit Union is best for Louisiana residents in the Shreveport and Bossier City area who qualify for membership and seek competitive rates on auto loans, mortgages, and savings products. The primary caveat is that credit union membership eligibility criteria apply, and the website lacks transparent disclosure of fees, credit requirements, and account terms needed for informed decision-making.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Willis Knighton — Credit Union in SHREVEPORT, LA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Willis Knighton — NCUA-insured credit union in SHREVEPORT, LA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
